Recently, the popular NFL host attended the NASCAR Anduril 250 street-course event, making her first appearance at one of the sport’s biggest race-day spectacles. What started as a casual day at the track quickly turned into a social media talking point.A simple candid photo from the event spread online, and before long, fans locked onto one unexpected detail. That was enough to get Kay Adams herself involved.The viral moment started when motorsports reporter Cole Cusumano posted a trackside picture of Kay Adams enjoying the event. The NFL host looked comfortable, soaking in the atmosphere and checking out the action up close. But as often happens online, the internet took the moment in a different direction. Instead of focusing on her NASCAR debut, fans zeroed in on the photo itself and flooded the comments with jokes.Kay Adams caught wind of it quickly and responded on X the same day. Reacting to the attention, she wrote, “Posting feet should be punishable by fire-squad". The post came directly after the race and instantly added more fuel to the online chatter.That response led to a wave of reactions, with many fans expressing mixed opinions.A fan said, "Without the big toe, it’s just a tease. That’s the make or break one,” one fan joked.Another fan wrote, “If the fire squad shows up, I hope they bring marshmallows for the toe-tasting crowd.”One more folk added, “Damn all them piggies went to market, huh?"One user seemed confused by the whole thing, writing, “I fail to see the correlation, explain please?”Another fan kept it blunt: “Only those with ugly feet are worried about showing them.”It was classic internet chaos, but Kay Adams handled it the same way she handles most things, with humor and perfect timing.That has become part of her brand. Whether she’s covering NFL headlines, interviewing stars, or sharing moments off-camera, Kay Adams knows how to keep fans engaged. Her move into NASCAR for the weekend showed that her reach now goes beyond football.Kay Adams still hosts “Up & Adams” daily on FanDuel TV, YouTube, and MAX Sports. And if this weekend proved anything, it’s that even away from NFL Sundays, she still knows how to steal the spotlight.
Article Summary: NFL host Kay Adams attended the NASCAR Anduril 250 street-course event. Fans zeroed in on the photo itself and flooded the comments with jokes. Kay Adams responded to the attention by saying, "Posting feet should be punishable by fire-squad"

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Indianapolis Colts and Atlanta Falcons linked to 49ers’ $3.5M quarterback amid growing pre-deadline buzz
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Indianapolis Colts and Atlanta Falcons linked to 49ers’ $3.5M quarterback amid growing pre-deadline buzz(Getty)

Which teams are interested in Mac Jones?

Category



Details



Player



Mac Jones



Current Team



San Francisco 49ers



Rumored Teams



Indianapolis Colts, Arizona Cardinals, Atlanta Falcons



Contract Value



2 years, $7 million



2026 Cash Payout



$3.55 million



Trade Likelihood



Moderate



Latest Insider Update



Anthony Palacios suggests San Francisco could explore a pre-deadline deal



Potential Return



Third and fifth-round picks





What insiders are saying about the rumors?

Contract details and salary cap implications

How could the trade impact both teams?



Mac Jones has quietly become one of the more interesting names in NFL trade chatter as the San Francisco 49ers continue shaping their quarterback room behind Brock Purdy. After stepping in during Purdy’s injury stretch last season and helping stabilise the offense, Jones has reportedly built enough value that San Francisco could consider moving him before the trade deadline.With rookie Kurtis Rourke earning internal praise and the San Francisco 49ers viewing him as a cheaper long-term backup option, speculation has started building around whether Jones could be dealt for draft capital while his value remains high.The Indianapolis Colts are one of the more logical fits. Their quarterback room remains unsettled, with uncertainty surrounding Anthony Richardson and questions about whether Daniel Jones can stay healthy and consistent. Mac Jones could offer insurance and starting experience without forcing the Colts into a major financial commitment.Meanwhile, the Arizona Cardinals have also been mentioned. After moving on from Kyler Murray, Arizona is in full transition mode with Gardner Minshew II and rookie Carson Beck. Adding Jones would give them a bridge option who still has upside as a starter.Additionally, the Atlanta Falcons round out the list. Despite bringing in Tua Tagovailoa , the long-term picture remains unclear, especially with Michael Penix Jr.still developing. Jones could become a fallback if Atlanta’s quarterback competition turns messy.Anthony Palacios of Last Word On Sports believes San Francisco’s quarterback room could create a real trade window for Mac Jones before the deadline. Palacios pointed out that the 49ers are growing increasingly confident in rookie Kurtis Rourke as a long-term backup option behind Brock Purdy. If that continues through training camp, San Francisco may feel comfortable moving Jones for draft capital rather than keeping him as an expensive QB2.He also noted that the team’s earlier “astronomical” asking price could soften, making a midseason deal much more realistic.Mac Jones signed a two-year, $7 million contract with San Francisco, carrying an average annual value of $3.5 million. His 2026 cap hit is $3.13 million, while his cash payout this season is $3.55 million.That makes him one of the more affordable experienced backups in the league. For teams like the Indianapolis Colts, the Arizona Cardinals, or the Atlanta Falcons, acquiring Jones would mean getting a quarterback with playoff and starting experience at a low cap cost. For the San Francisco 49ers, moving him could free up space and add draft assets while fully committing to Rourke as Purdy’s long-term backup.For the San Francisco 49ers, trading Mac Jones would signal confidence in their quarterback depth and allow them to cash in on a player whose value may never be higher. For a team like the Indianapolis Colts or Atlanta Falcons, it could solve immediate depth issues without forcing a long-term gamble. Arizona, meanwhile, could use Jones as a stopgap while letting Beck develop at a slower pace.With the trade deadline still months away, this is one storyline worth watching closely.
Article Summary: The Indianapolis Colts, Arizona Cardinals, and Atlanta Falcons have all been linked to 49ers quarterback Mac Jones. Jones signed a two-year, $7 million contract with San Francisco, carrying an average annual value of $3.5 million. The Colts are one of the more logical fits as their quarterback room remains unsettled. Jones could offer insurance and starting experience without forcing the Colts into a major financial commitment.

Article Title: Pat McAfee’s unexpected business move adds new twist to his $60 million ESPN future
Article Text:
Pat McAfee’s unexpected business move adds new twist to his $60 million ESPN future (Via The Pat McAfee Show)

Pat McAfee becomes co-owner of Jams while a big ESPN payday waits

Pat McAfee has built his brand by staying loud, visible, and unpredictable. Whether it’s on ESPN, WWE , or his daily show, he keeps finding ways to stay in the spotlight. Now, he has made a move nobody saw coming.While Pat McAfee continues working toward a reported $60 million ESPN extension, he has stepped into the business world in a much bigger way. This time, it is not the media. It is food, and it could be a serious long-term play.Recently, Pat McAfee has joined Jams, the fast-rising peanut butter and jelly brand, as a co-owner, according to “Sports Business Journal.” The partnership marks the first food and beverage investment of McAfee’s career and adds another lane to his already growing empire.The move did not come out of nowhere. For months, “The Pat McAfee Show” crew had been eating Jams products on air and talking about them almost daily. It became a regular part of the show. That connection slowly built into something bigger.Jams founder Connor Blakely explained why Pat McAfee made sense for the company. Blakely said, “What’s special about this is that Pat chose our team and our product for the first investment of this kind in his career.”That matters because Jams is no longer a small startup. The company launched in July 2025 and quickly secured shelf space at Walmart and Target. It also recently became the NFLPA's exclusive PB&J partner, giving it even stronger ties to football. NFL names like J.J. Watt and Caleb Williams have already backed the brand.Pat McAfee also opened up on why he got involved. In the same “Sports Business Journal interview, he said, They pushed the product hard,” McAfee told SBJ. “How can you not respect that? When you’re dealing with people who believe so deeply in who they are and what they do, it touches you in a way that makes you want to be involved.”Connor Blakely described why McAfee is the right fit: “When you think about a picture-perfect representative for our product, there’s no doubt it’s Pat. He wears so many different hats. Being a father, media personality, and former professional athlete — so well that he really encompasses what we’re trying to do. We want Jams to be a product that the next generation of kids, no matter who they are, grow up eating. Pat’s really the perfect person to help us get there. ”That remark says plenty about the surprise of Pat McAfee’s move. The analyst respects hustle, and Jams sold him on belief. The current situation also makes this move stand out. Earlier in June, The Athletic reported McAfee and ESPN are in talks over a new deal worth around $60 million per year. If that deal gets done, it would make him one of the network’s highest-paid analysts.But while that contract still hangs in the air, McAfee is moving anyway. That is the real story here. Pat McAfee is not waiting on ESPN to shape his future. He is building his own.
Article Summary: Pat McAfee has joined Jams, the fast-rising peanut butter and jelly brand, as a co-owner. The partnership marks the first food and beverage investment of McAfee’s career. Earlier in June, The Athletic reported McAfee and ESPN are in talks over a new deal worth around $60 million per year.

Article Title: “All those people might not...": Taylor Swift got the most unexpected pre-wedding pep talk from Este Haim
Article Text:
Taylor Swift gets heartfelt pre-wedding advice from Este Haim as Travis Kelce wedding buzz intensifies (Getty Images)

What did Este Haim tell Taylor Swift about her wedding?

Voicemails for Isabelle

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are weeks away from what could be the most-watched wedding in pop culture history. With July 3 at Madison Square Garden now widely reported as the date and venue, the noise around their nuptials keeps getting louder. NDAs, celebrity performances, elaborate staging rivalling Swift's Eras Tour – the speculation is relentless. Amid all of it, Swift's close friend and musician Este Haim offered something far more grounded: honest advice from someone who has just been through it.Haim, who married tech entrepreneur Jonathan Levin on New Year's Eve 2025, spoke to People at the premiere of Netflix'searlier this week. She did not overthink her message."Have as much fun as possible. Just enjoy it," Haim said. "I was so overwhelmed. I mean, I enjoyed my wedding so much. But I wish that I had also just stopped for a second and took it in. I didn't get to do that."It is the kind of advice that sounds obvious until you are standing in the middle of a thousand people and cannot quite remember how you got there. For Taylor Swift, whose wedding is reportedly set to draw a guest list of that exact size, the chaos of the day will be real.There will be no quiet corners, no slow dances with just close friends watching. Every moment will carry weight, and there will simply not be enough time to feel all of it.That is precisely Haim's point."Just take it in for a second and just have the best time. Have so much fun," she added. "All those people might not be in the same room ever again."It is a line that lands harder when you consider the scale of what Swift is walking into. She reportedly invited guests personally over the phone. Names like Selena Gomez, Gigi Hadid, Karlie Kloss, and Andy Reid have surfaced in various reports. Even Suki Waterhouse told Variety she plans to attend and "steal ideas" for her own upcoming wedding to Robert Pattinson.Haim also reflected on what marriage has actually meant in her own life, beyond the wedding itself. "We still do the same (expletive). We just love each other and have fun together. And I'm always like, 'We better still be dating forever.' As long as we do that — always be dating — we'll be fine."Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have stayed deliberately quiet on the details. Their August 2025 engagement was announced on Instagram with a playful caption from Swift – "Your English teacher and your gym teacher are getting married" – but since then, the couple has shared nothing publicly about the wedding. Guests are reportedly required to sign NDAs. Sources close to the event have told outlets that everyone involved has been "sworn to secrecy. "The June 13 wedding rumour was put to rest when both were spotted at separate events that day. July 3 is now the date most outlets are pointing to, with training camp on the horizon giving Kelce a clear deadline.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are weeks away from what could be the most-watched wedding in pop culture history. July 3 at Madison Square Garden now widely reported as the date and venue. Haim: "I wish that I had also just stopped for a second and took it in. I didn't get to do that"

Article Title: Fired over Mike Vrabel-Dianna Russini controversy, Crissy Froyd announces bold new career path in emotional update
Article Text:
Crissy Froyd shares next chapter in her career (Getty Images)

Why is Crissy Froyd going to law school after the Dianna Russini scandal?

NFL reporter Crissy Froyd is not slowing down. Two months after USA Today cut ties with her for publicly criticizing Dianna Russini over the Mike Vrabel resort photos scandal, Froyd announced on X that she is heading to law school for criminal defense -- all while keeping her sports journalism career going. It is a bold move from someone who has refused to retreat since the moment her viral post ignited one of the messiest media controversies the NFL press corps has seen in years.The law school announcement is not coming out of nowhere. Crissy Froyd posted her news directly to her followers, writing: "I am so excited to announce that in addition to my successful journalism career, I am going to law school for criminal defense. So looking forward to this journey!"For anyone who has followed this story closely, the legal pivot makes sense. Froyd has already been sending legal warnings to critics who made what she described as false accusations against her. She also wrote on X: "I've got too much going for me and am tired of this. I hope she's found guilty of tampering as she is. And I hope she sues me so I can demand discovery. Dianna, I wish you were worth a feather." That is not the language of someone who wants to disappear quietly. That is someone who wants the receipts.The whole saga kicked off in April when Dianna Russini resigned from The Athletic after the New York Post published photos of her with Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel at an Arizona resort. Froyd went public with sharp criticism, and USA Today severed her freelance contract within 48 hours. She has since landed at Heavy Sports and shown no signs of toning anything down.What surprised Froyd most was not losing the job. It was being left largely alone in calling it out. Speaking with Mike J. Asti, she said: "It caught me off guard because I never expected this to happen. I thought that everyone, since all these people knew, and all these people told me from the time that I first hit the ground in the NFL. I was like, 'Okay, everyone's saying stuff, or at least I thought so.'" That backup from colleagues never materialized, and the major networks have largely kept quiet on the Vrabel-Russini investigation.On the Howard Eskin Show in early June, Froyd went further, claiming she knew of "at least six" female reporters who had allegedly engaged in similar conduct with NFL personnel, though she acknowledged she could not publicly name names due to potential legal disputes. Big claims, and ones that remain unverified. But Froyd has made clear she is not finished talking.Adding a law degree to her resume only sharpens that edge.
Article Summary: Crissy Froyd announced on X that she is heading to law school for criminal defense. The move is a bold move from someone who has refused to retreat since the moment her viral post ignited one of the messiest media controversies the NFL press corps has seen in years. The law school announcement is not coming out of nowhere.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Dallas Cowboys' $6 Million WR linked to Kansas City Chiefs in blockbuster trade prediction
Article Text:
George Pickens has been linked with the Kansas City Chiefs in a blockbuster trade prediction ahead of the 2026 NFL trade deadline. While the Dallas Cowboys wide receiver recently dismissed holdout concerns, one analyst believes Kansas City could pursue him if Dallas falls out of playoff contention. The Chiefs' need for another proven receiver and Pickens' uncertain long-term future with the Cowboys continue to fuel speculation about a potential midseason move.

Category Details Player George Pickens Current Team Dallas Cowboys Rumored Team Kansas City Chiefs Contract Status Final year of rookie contract Salary Cap Hit Approximately $3.66 million (2026) Trade Likelihood Low unless Dallas falls out of playoff contention Latest Insider Update Bleacher Report predicts Chiefs could pursue Pickens before the deadline Potential Return Not specified

Which teams are interested in George Pickens?

What insiders are saying about the trade rumors

Contract details and salary cap implications

How the trade could impact both teams

George Pickens continues to be linked with a possible move away from the Dallas Cowboys, with the Kansas City Chiefs emerging as a rumored destination ahead of the 2026 NFL trade deadline. While no deal is being discussed publicly, one analyst believes Dallas could consider moving the wide receiver if its season unravels. Pickens is playing on the final year of his rookie contract, which carries a salary cap hit of roughly $3.66 million in 2026.Trade speculation around George Pickens has quieted since he reported to the Cowboys' mandatory minicamp and dismissed concerns about a contract-related holdout. Still, that has not stopped analysts from looking ahead to the trade deadline.Bleacher Report's Moe Moton believes Kansas City could emerge as a logical landing spot if Dallas decides to move the wide receiver during the season. The Chiefs have lingering uncertainty at the position. Rashee Rice could face league discipline following additional legal issues, while Xavier Worthy is coming off a disappointing 2025 campaign.Kansas City would benefit from adding a proven outside target capable of stretching the field. Pickens fits that profile, giving Patrick Mahomes another playmaker if the Chiefs decide to be aggressive.Moton believes Dallas could explore a trade if younger receiver Ryan Flournoy develops into a dependable contributor."If Flournoy blossoms in a complementary role, the Cowboys could trade Pickens to a receiver-needy contending team like the Kansas City Chiefs, who don't have a reliable lead perimeter playmaker," he wrote.That scenario, however, depends on much more than Flournoy's progress. A midseason trade would likely require Dallas to be well out of the playoff race. If the Cowboys remain competitive, moving one of Dak Prescott 's top weapons would make little football sense.Pickens is entering the final season of his rookie contract, making his long-term future one of the Cowboys' biggest roster decisions.He does not have a no-trade clause, giving Dallas flexibility if it chooses to move him. The franchise tag also remains an option in 2027, although keeping both Pickens and CeeDee Lamb on expensive long-term deals could become difficult under the salary cap.For Kansas City, acquiring Pickens would immediately strengthen the receiving corps and provide Mahomes with another proven target for a playoff push.For Dallas, the calculation would be very different. Trading Pickens during a losing season could allow the Cowboys to collect future draft capital instead of risking losing him later. If Dallas is still chasing a postseason spot, though, keeping Pickens would almost certainly remain the priority.
Article Summary: George Pickens has been linked with a possible move away from the Dallas Cowboys. Bleacher Report's Moe Moton believes Kansas City could emerge as a logical landing spot if Dallas decides to move the wide receiver during the season. For Kansas City, acquiring Pickens would immediately strengthen the receiving corps and provide Patrick Mahomes with another proven target.

Article Title: "Russini and Vrabel talked about....": Mike Vrabel's scandal takes explosive turn as deleted Dianna Russini post fuels Patriots tampering debate
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel's ongoing controversy has intensified after an old deleted social media post by former NFL insider Dianna Russini resurfaced, prompting renewed allegations of possible Patriots tampering during Morgan Moses' free agency. NFL podcaster Tony Farmer argued the post could indicate prior communication rather than merely an editing mistake. Meanwhile, Rob Gronkowski urged the Patriots to focus on winning, saying success on the field is the best way to move past the offseason distraction.

Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini controversy raises new Patriots tampering questions

Rob Gronkowski says winning is the only way for Mike Vrabel to move forward

The NFL continues to buzz about New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel, after a since-deleted social media post by former NFL insider Dianna Russini resurfaced online. The renewed focus has sparked new speculation about whether the Patriots could be scrutinized over their signing of offensive tackle Morgan Moses.While no formal finding of wrongdoing has been announced by the NFL, the resurfaced post and ongoing public discussion have kept the story alive during the offseason, with analysts and former players offering sharply different perspectives.The latest debate centers on a social media post Russini shared before Morgan Moses officially entered the legal free agency negotiating period. The original graphic reportedly displayed Moses alongside Patriots branding before being deleted and replaced with a revised version.At the time, Russini attributed the mistake to a photo editing error. However, the situation has returned to the spotlight after NFL podcaster Tony Farmer argued that the deleted post deserves renewed attention.Farmer wrote, “People completely misunderstand the implications of Dianna Russini’s deleted Morgan Moses tweet [2025] – it’s not potential evidence of wrongdoing between Russini and Vrabel. It’s potential evidence of alleged wrongdoing by the Patriots (tampering) and evidence Russini and Vrabel talked about that alleged wrongdoing by New England.”He added, “People on X called for an investigation at the time. Most journalists and the NFL completely ignored it. If the NFL had investigated, it might have learned that Vrabel and Russini are close.”Despite those claims, there has been no public finding by the NFL that the Patriots violated league tampering rules. Likewise, no official evidence has been presented establishing that any league policy was broken.As speculation continues, Patriots legend Rob Gronkowski believes the best response has nothing to do with public statements.Speaking to Fox News Digital, Gronkowski offered a simple solution.“It’s as easy as this: win,” Gronkowski told Fox News Digital. “You come together as a team. You work together, you work your butt off. Everyone has to show that they’re accountable during training camp and the preseason. Once the regular season comes, you gotta win, baby. If you win, it solves all problems. It really does.”Meanwhile, former NFL reporter Crissy Froyd said she was surprised by the fallout after publicly discussing the controversy.“It caught me off guard because I never expected this to happen,” Froyd said. “I thought that everyone, since all these people knew, and all these people told me from the time that I first hit the ground in the NFL. I was like, ‘Okay, everyone’s saying stuff, or at least I thought so.”For now, the conversation remains driven by public commentary rather than official league action. Unless new evidence emerges or the NFL opens an investigation, the discussion surrounding Vrabel, Russini, and the Patriots remains rooted in allegations and speculation rather than established findings.
Article Summary: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini controversy raises new Patriots tampering questions. NFL podcaster Tony Farmer argued the post could indicate prior communication rather than merely an editing mistake. Meanwhile, Rob Gronkowski urged the Patriots to focus on winning, saying success on the field is the best way to move forward.

Article Title: "This is why kids are so messed up": Analyst accuses Gisele Bundchen of disrespecting Tom Brady, raises concerns about their children's well-being
Article Text:
Tom Brady became the subject of online debate after Gisele Bundchen shared a Father's Day tribute to her husband, Joaquim Valente, without mentioning the former NFL quarterback, with whom she shares two children. Analyst Thomas Malloy criticized the omission, claiming it could negatively affect the children and spark unnecessary emotional strain. The post divided social media users, while neither Brady nor Bundchen has publicly responded to the growing online discussion.

Tom Brady omission from Gisele Bundchen's Father's Day post sparks criticism

Tom Brady and Gisele Bundchen continue co-parenting after divorce

Tom Brady was an unexpected name thrown into the Father’s Day mix after Gisele Bundchen ’s latest Instagram tribute had heads turning all over social media. The post was meant as a tribute to her husband, Joaquim Valente, but some fans quickly pointed out that the seven-time Super Bowl champion was absent from the post, even though the pair share two children.The omission prompted mixed reactions online. One of the more vocal responses was from analyst Thomas Malloy, whose comments ignited renewed discussion around blended families, co-parenting and how public figures handle family milestones after divorce.Bundchen dedicated her Father's Day message to Joaquim Valente, praising his role within their family. She wrote, "Happy Father's Day @joaquimvalente! Thank you for leading by example, and for the values you embody, love, humility, integrity, discipline, kindness and consistency. You are an incredible role model. We are all so grateful for you, and we love you so much."The heartfelt tribute featured family photos, including one of Bundchen, Valente, and their children standing beneath a rainbow on the beach. Other images showed Valente spending time with Benjamin and Vivian, the two children Bundchen shares with Brady.Although Brady was not referenced in the post, Bundchen did not explain whether the message was intended exclusively for her current husband.That did not stop social media users from weighing in.Analyst Thomas Malloy, known on X as Walks&WallStreet, criticized the post, writing, "This is why kids are so messed up and have mental health issues. Divorce and getting your kids involved with randos. It must be total psychological warfare on the children. So sad 😞"His remarks quickly circulated online, with users expressing sharply divided opinions.Brady and Bundchen, who wed in 2009, split in 2022 after nearly 13 years of marriage. Both have since moved on with their personal lives – while continuing to co-parent son Benjamin and daughter Vivian. Bundchen and Joaquim Valente started dating in 2022, and the couple was later married, reports said.The couple also introduced their first child together last year as they embark on a new chapter in her family life. Father’s Day messages from celebrities often get attention, especially in families that have been through highly publicized splits. A simple social media tribute from Brady and Bundchen sparked widespread discussion about parenting, public perception and life after divorce.Brady and Bundchen have not publicly responded to the backlash to the post online. The talk, at this stage, is more about what people think than anything from the former couple.
Article Summary: Gisele Bundchen shared a Father's Day tribute to her husband, Joaquim Valente, without mentioning the former NFL quarterback. Analyst Thomas Malloy criticized the omission, claiming it could negatively affect the children and spark unnecessary emotional strain. Neither Brady nor Bundchen has publicly responded to the growing online discussion.

Article Title: "A sign of mistrust": Taylor Swift's father reportedly steps in with strict prenup plan before Travis Kelce wedding
Article Text:
Fresh reports claim Travis Kelce has no issue with an alleged prenuptial agreement being prepared ahead of his rumored wedding to Taylor Swift. According to anonymous insiders, Scott Swift has helped create an "ironclad" prenup to protect the singer's business empire and music assets. Sources say Kelce fully supports the decision, viewing it as practical financial planning. However, neither Swift nor Kelce has confirmed the reported prenup or the ongoing wedding speculation.

Travis Kelce reportedly backs Taylor Swift prenup discussions

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce continue to face wedding speculation

New reports about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce ‘s relationship have sparked another round of online chatter, this time over allegations of a prenup. Swift and Kelce have not publicly addressed the latest rumors, but a new report says the NFL star is all in for financial planning ahead of their rumored wedding.The claims arrive as fans continue to speculate about the couple's future together. Despite growing chatter across entertainment media, there has been no official confirmation regarding wedding dates or legal arrangements from either side.According to a report from Rob Shuter's Naughty But Nice, Taylor Swift's father, Scott Swift, has taken an active role in preparing what sources describe as an "ironclad" prenup. The reported agreement is said to focus on protecting the singer's extensive business empire, music catalog, and financial interests.One insider praised Scott Swift's approach, saying, "Scott is the definition of a great father. He's spent his entire adult life protecting Taylor while giving her the freedom to become the biggest star in the world. He's always there, but never in the spotlight."Scott is also characterized in the same report as a careful businessman who combines warmth with resolute action.Another source describes him as “a fist in a velvet glove.” "Polite" and "charming" with a "warm" demeanor, the insider added, but when it comes to protecting his daughter and her business interests, no one is more strategic.Although celebrity prenups often generate headlines, legal experts have long viewed them as standard financial planning tools, especially when high-value assets, intellectual property, and business ventures are involved.The report also claims Kelce has never objected to the proposed arrangement. Instead, insiders say he understands why financial protections are important, particularly considering the scale of Swift's career and business portfolio.One source explained, "When you're dealing with nearly $2 billion in combined assets, a prenup isn't a sign of mistrust. It's smart business."According to the same report, Kelce respects Scott Swift's role in helping build one of entertainment's biggest brands and reportedly viewed the discussions as practical rather than personal.Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have been in a public relationship since 2023, that continues to garner widespread public attention. Recent reports also claimed a private wedding followed by a larger celebration at Madison Square Garden. Those claims, however, have yet to be verified.Until either Swift or Kelce publicly comments, the reported prenup and wedding plans should be treated as speculation rather than established fact. For now, the latest reports simply add another chapter to one of entertainment and sports' most closely watched relationships.
Article Summary: Travis Kelce reportedly backs Taylor Swift prenup discussions. Sources say Kelce fully supports the decision, viewing it as practical financial planning. Swift and Kelce have not publicly addressed the latest rumors, but a new report says the NFL star is all in for financial planning ahead of their rumored wedding.

Article Title: "She is having a change of heart": Taylor Swift's bond with Blake Lively reportedly shifts as she gears up to marry Travis Kelce
Article Text:
Taylor Swift's bond with Blake Lively reportedly shifts as she gears up to marry Travis Kelce.(Image via Getty Images)

Taylor Swift and Blake Lively might have been talking for a few weeks ahead of her wedding to Travis Kelce



Where are Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce really getting married?



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding has billions waiting across the world as many remain curious if the pop star will be inviting her former best friend, popular Hollywood actress Blake Lively.While both Taylor Swift and Blake Lively have remained publicly distant from one another in the last year and a half, it seems things might have changed in the last few days.A few hours ago, as per the Daily Mail, a source revealed, “Everyone around Taylor is aware that Blake could attend. She may not, but that won't be because she isn't welcome.”A second source added, “Blake is on the cusp of getting a second chance, and they have had some loose conversations to test the waters to get the trust back. Blake is slowly getting back into the fold now that Taylor is having a change of heart.”As per the Daily Mail, a third source has revealed that the popular actress Blake Lively does not “want to be seen as not going to the wedding” since “her image is very important to her” and that she and Taylor Swift never even “fully stopped being friends.”However, nothing has been confirmed yet as both Taylor Swift and Hollywood actress Blake Lively have remained strictly private about their strained bond.At this point in time, all eyes remain on the billionaire pop star Taylor Swift and the Kansas City Chiefs’ popular tight end, Travis Kelce, as the two gear up to get married on 3rd July.While the wedding venue is rumored to be New York City’s Madison Square Garden, nothing has been confirmed yet.Both Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce seem to be deeply in love as the billionaire pop star has expressed how happy she is in her life.A few weeks ago, Taylor Swift won an award and said, "I think that this album probably also feels very happy and confident and free because that's the way that I get to feel every single day of my life because of my fiancé, who's here."
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding has billions waiting across the world as many remain curious if the pop star will be inviting her former best friend, popular Hollywood actress Blake Lively. A few hours ago, as per the Daily Mail, a source revealed, “Everyone around Taylor is aware that Blake could attend. She may not, but that won't be because she isn't welcome.”

Article Title: Who is Geno Smith's alleged ex girlfriend? Everything about the woman making controversial domestic violence allegations against him
Article Text:
Who is Geno Smith's alleged ex girlfriend? Everything about the woman making controversial domestic violence allegations against him.(Image via Getty Images)

All about Geno Smith’s ex girlfriend who has made controversial allegations against him



What went wrong between Geno Smith and his alleged ex girlfriend ahead of the new season?



The New York Jets’ star player, Geno Smith, was gearing up for the next season when he found himself in major legal trouble after an alleged ex girlfriend accused him of domestic violence and being neglectful of a child.The controversial accusations have sparked shockwaves across the league and many are curious about Geno Smith’s alleged ex girlfriend.The woman who has made the controversial allegations against the New York Jets’ star player, Geno Smith, is named Kristen.Kristen used her public social media sites with the username “@everythingkrisxo” to post a clip of her yelling at Geno Smith as she made the accusations. The clip has since then been deleted.Interestingly, it has not been confirmed if the child she is referring to in her videos is actually a child that the two share.While the New York Jets’ star player, Geno Smith, has publicly declared fathering a son named Seven Santana Smith in 2019, it remains unclear whether this is the same child who is being referred to in the videos.For the unversed, just a few hours back, on Father’s Day, Kristen posted clips of Geno Smith being shirtless as he paced outside his house while she was heard yelling at him.In the clip, she says, "GENO SMITH beat my a— cause he HATES taking care of his special needs kid and can't be left alone with him…”While Geno Smith has not been arrested yet, authorities in Davie, Florida told Complex, “Police responded to the Smith residence yesterday [Sunday, June 21]; however, no arrest was made.”In a follow up post on Instagram, Kristen wrote, “Throwing my purses out and stealing my money out my car with his high deranged a*s…”In another clip, she wrote, “Charges pressed…Been supportive of this DEMON and his narcissistic personality disorder ALL MY DAMN LIFE!!!!!!”At this point in time, both Geno Smith and the New York Jets have stayed silent and distant from the allegations as it sparks shockwaves across the league.
Article Summary: The woman who has made the controversial allegations against the New York Jets’ star player, Geno Smith, is named Kristen. It has not been confirmed if the child she is referring to in her videos is actually a child that the two share. The controversial accusations have sparked shockwaves across the league.

Article Title: New York Jets QB Geno Smith allegedly accused of domestic violence, child neglect, and more: “he’d rather play Call of Duty”
Article Text:
New York Jets QB Geno Smith allegedly accused of domestic violence, child neglect, and more: “he’d rather play Call of Duty” (Image via Getty: Geno Smith)

A woman accuses former Las Vegas Raiders QB Geno Smith of physically assaulting her

UPDATE:

Several cybercitizens stood up for Geno Smith amid assault allegations

Geno Smith for the Jets like Stefon Diggs for the Patriots

A shocking story emerged about New York Jets quarterback Geno Smith.A 1-minute video was posted on Instagram by [everythingkrisxo], recording the former Las Vegas Raiders QB.The caption of the video read:“Today is the day. Geno Smith beat my as* causehe hates taking care of his special needs kid and can’t be left alone with himbecause he’d rather watch s*x online and play Call of Duty.”The 1-minute-long video recorded by a woman reportedly shows Geno Smith topless and in black shorts.He appeared to be on the phone speaking to someone.According to Football Forever, the former Las Vegas Raiders QB can be heard saying, “She just called the police.”The woman recording the video can be heard making additional allegations while recording.She apparently sounded emotional/terrified/worried. And the video was presumably recorded outside Smith’s residence.Heavy Sports’ Isaac Zuniga reports that there has been no public confirmation regarding the alleged incident.There have been no police reports, arrests, charges, or official statements.The allegations remain unverified. And Smith has not responded to the horrific claims.NFL Insider Ari Meirov reports Geno Smith was investigated Sunday for an alleged battery. But no charges were filed, and the case is now closed.Police responded to Smith's house after receiving a call.Checked everything out and left without taking anyone into custody.“She’s trying to drop crazy allegations, meanwhile, he’s just trying to rank up,” a user wrote on X.Another said, “from this video, it looks like she’s the aggressor and not him.”A post read, “all I can see is a crazy woman provoking an innocent man.”A commenter wrote, “N*gga was going home to this, now we know why he been playing like sh*t.”A user said, “Why doesn’t she take care of the special needs child. And if you check it, he only pushed her out of his house.These women are so quick to jump on a camera and jump online, talking about harassment.”A user commented, “Gotta be careful with women…Notice how a lot of greatest athletes like [LeBron James] got married early or didn’t bother with women until retiring.Surrounding yourself with the right people makes all the difference, especially in a field where everybody’s watching.”Remember Stefon Diggs’ former personal chef Mila Adams? Who allegedly accused the then-New England Patriots wide receiver of battery and suffocation charges?It happened just months before the Super Bowl. His performance was at its peak… but when the allegations surfaced, it seemed to falter.Even after reaching the Super Bowl, his performance severely dipped, and the Patriots lost the Lombardi Trophy to the Sam Darnold-led Seattle Seahawks.So, like Stefon Diggs was a supposed distraction for the New England Patriots, Geno Smith could become a major distraction for the New York Jets ---- if his alleged domestic violence case continues all 2026 offseason and straight into 2026 preseason, which is just less than 2 months away now...
Article Summary: A 1-minute video was posted on Instagram by [everythingkrisxo], recording the former Las Vegas Raiders QB. The woman recording the video can be heard making additional allegations while recording. There have been no police reports, arrests, charges, or official statements.

Article Title: ‘One final season’ incoming? Saints star Cameron Jordan reappears on NFL Top 100 alongside Colts mainstay Quenton Nelson
Article Text:
Cameron Jordan and Quenton Nelson re-enter the NFL Top 100 after multiple years away from the player-voted rankings. (Image via Getty)

Cameron Jordan’s late-career resurgence helped put him back among the NFL’s best

Quenton Nelson’s consistency finally earned another trip back to the rankings

The NFL 's annual Top 100 reveal began Monday, and two veterans who had disappeared from the rankings for years immediately found their way back.New Orleans Saints defensive end Cameron Jordan checked in at No. 100, while Indianapolis Colts guard Quenton Nelson landed at No. 99 in the player-voted list. For both players, the selections mark their first appearances since 2023 and 2022, respectively.Jordan's inclusion carries extra weight. Less than a week after re-signing with New Orleans, the eight-time Pro Bowler posted a video ending with the phrases "one team" and "one final season." Now, NFL players have rewarded him with another spot among the league's top performers.Jordan entered the 2025 season facing questions about whether his best years were behind him.Instead, he delivered one of his strongest campaigns in recent memory. The Saints veteran finished with 47 tackles, 15 tackles for loss, 10.5 sacks, 15 quarterback hits and two forced fumbles across 17 games.According to NFL Network, those 10.5 sacks were Jordan's highest total since 2021. NFL Pro Insight also noted that his 30 quarterback pressures were his most since 2023, while his 9.4% pressure rate was his highest since 2020.The recognition represents a significant turnaround. Jordan combined for just six sacks across the 2023 and 2024 seasons before bouncing back in 2025.Arizona Cardinals tight end Trey McBride praised the veteran defender during NFL Network's Top 100 feature."I just think he plays with a lot of heart. He plays with a lot of passion."Jordan, who turns 37 on July 10, enters his 16th NFL season ranked 17th on the league's all-time sacks list with 132 career sacks.Unlike Jordan, Nelson's case was never about a comeback season. It was about recognition.The No. 6 overall pick in the 2018 NFL Draft has made the Pro Bowl in all eight NFL seasons, yet this is only his fourth appearance on the NFL Top 100 and his first since 2022.Nelson remained one of the league's most reliable interior linemen in 2025. He played 1,039 snaps and allowed only one sack, according to Pro Football Focus. NFL Network also noted that his 96.7% playtime rate was the highest among Colts offensive players.His impact showed up across Indianapolis' offense. The Colts finished in the top 10 in both total yards and points, while ranking among the league's better rushing teams and allowing one of the NFL's lowest sack totals.The 2026 NFL Top 100 rollout still has months to go, but Jordan and Nelson have already accomplished something notable. After years away from the rankings, both veterans are back on a list decided by the people who line up against them every Sunday.
Article Summary: The NFL's annual Top 100 reveal began Monday. New Orleans Saints defensive end Cameron Jordan checked in at No. 100, while Indianapolis Colts guard Quenton Nelson landed in No. 99. For both players, the selections mark their first appearances since 2023 and 2022, respectively.

Article Title: NFL QB Matt Leinart gets brutally roasted by Alexa before his son: “his pro career didn’t amount to much”
Article Text:
NFL QB Matt Leinart gets brutally roasted by Alexa before his son: “his pro career didn’t amount to much” (Image via Getty: Matt Leinart and Fernando Mendoza)

Alexa gives brutally honest opinion on former NFL QB Matt Leinart before his son

Could Fernando Mendoza be a bust

Once a college football player wins a Heisman Trophy, expectations for him rise in the NFL He will outperform his stats. He will become the best rookie in his NFL franchise.But then that’s not what happened with Matt Leinart.A quiet breakfast morning turned into an insulting history class.Who knew what was going to come up at the Leinhart household?Leinart’s wife, Josie Loren , entered the kitchen and dining area with her phone video recorder on.Next thing she knew, her son asked Alexa, “Who’s Matt Leinart?”Alexa replied, “From rootsports.com,Matt Leinart was a Heisman Trophy-winning quarterback at USC and a top 10 NFL draft pick.But his pro career didn’t amount to much.”Matt looked beyond confused and embarrassed. He laughed it off and said, “Really?”Josie snortingly laughed and said, “Yikes…Oh well.” Matt exclaimed, “Wow, Alexa’s rough. Damn!”The video is from last offseason but going viral even today!Anyhow, could Matt Leinart’s trajectory be taken as a wake-up call for Heisman Trophy winner Fernando Mendoza?With all the hype about and around him for the 2026 season... The Sports Junkies of 106.7 The Fan debated whether Fernando Mendoza could be a bust in the NFL.John “Cakes” Auville believes the Las Vegas Raiders are still rebuilding and that Mendoza is unlikely to have a strong rookie season.He suggests that Mendoza should start Week 1 to gain experience rather than sit behind veteran Kirk Cousins for several weeks together.John-Paul “JP” Flaim agrees with Cakes, stating that young quarterbacks develop best by playing. He cited Cam Ward as an example.But he thinks a new coaching staff may want Kirk Cousins to take the lead, so the team has a better chance of winning.Jason “Bish” Bishop noted that Mendoza would face a difficult AFC West schedule, including games against the Kansas City Chiefs, Los Angeles Chargers, and Denver Broncos.He said Cousins could remain the starter for the first Weeks 6-8 of the 2026 season.Cakes predicts the Raiders would finish last in the AFC West unless the Chiefs are severely affected by Patrick Mahomes ’ long absence due to a 2025 season-ending injury.Eric “EB” Bickel projects Mendoza’s ceiling similar to Jared Goff and his floor around Trevor Lawrence .He believes Mendoza will avoid becoming a major bust.Cakes cautioned that Mendoza’s development may take time.He suggests that even if Mendoza develops into a player similar to Kirk Cousins, that could still represent a highly successful and lengthy NFL career.
Article Summary: Alexa gives brutally honest opinion on former NFL QB Matt Leinart before his son asks, “Who’s Matt Le inart?” The Sports Junkies of 106.7 The Fan debated whether Fernando Mendoza could be a bust in the NFL.

Article Title: Public scorekeeping: Gisele Bundchen reportedly snubs Tom Brady of Father’s Day appreciation post and gives credit to Joaquim Valente
Article Text:
“Public score keeping”: Gisele Bundchen reportedly snubs Tom Brady of Father’s Day appreciation post and gives credit to Joaquim Valente (Image 1 via Getty, Image 2 via Instagram: Tom Brady, Gisele Bundchen, and Joaquim Valente)

Gisele Bundchen brutally trolled for not wishing Tom Brady Happy Father’s Day on Instagram

True maturity is not in erasing the father of your first children

Joaquim Valente poses with Benjamin Rein Brady , Vivian Lake Brady , and toddler son

Tom Brady admits he was not as good a father to his three children as his father was to him.But to snub him of his yearly appreciation?Just because he is no longer part of everyday life… that did not sit well with some cybercitizens.When Brady’s ex-wife Gisele Bundchen posted Father’s Day appreciation post celebrating her current husband Joaquim Valente and not Brady, it quickly came to everyone’s notice.“Tom Brady is a tall, handsome, multi-millionaire with 7 Super Bowl rings, and his wife still cheated on him with the personal trainer.We don’t call women losers enough,” expressed one user.Another pointed out, “Don’t forget the father of your other kids. He helped raise them, too.”A post read, “give a b*tch the world and she gonna want the moon.”A commenter wrote, “What a disgusting wh*re.”Another summed up the Brazilian supermodel’s life in a comment:“Tom Brady spent years building a life with Gisele Bundchen, raising three children, providing for his family, and being a devoted husband and father.After everything they built together, she moved on with her jiu-jitsu instructor [Joaquim Valente], had a child with him,and now celebrates Father’s Day with the man she replaced the father of her own children with.That’s a brutal way to rewrite a family’s story.”There was a brutal comment that called out Bundchen for erasing the NFL legend.“True maturity in co-parenting means understanding that honoring a new partner does not require erasing the father of your first children.Public acknowledgments aren’t just about the adults--they are a reflection of harmony and respect for the kids who love both parents.While a new chapter deserves its own celebration,entirely omitting a father who remains central to your children’s lives risks looking like public scorekeeping rather than peace.True grace acknowledges every piece of the village it takes to raise a family.Love [Tom Brady] for everything he has done for your family, Gisele Bundchen.”The height of not wishing the father of two of her children reached when she posted the two children’s photos individually with Joaquim Valente, her second husband, and their stepfather.This, too, did not sit well with cybercitizens.Gisele shared snapshots of Valente with Tom Brady’s children Benjamin Rein Brady and Vivian Lake Brady.She also shared several photos of herself and their toddler son, whose middle name is “River.”The first snapshot shows Joaquim and Benjamin standing back-to-back, their similar heights evident.The second image shows Vivian giving Joaquim a heartfelt, over-the-shoulder hug while he enjoys dessert at the dining table.His eyes are closed in affection, and he holds Vivian’s hands, mirroring her adoration.The last snapshot shows Joaquim with Gisele and their toddler son on a beach, with a beautiful sunset in the background.
Article Summary: Gisele shared snapshots of Joaquim Valente with Tom Brady’s children Benjamin Rein Brady and Vivian Lake Brady. She also shared several photos of herself and their toddler son, whose middle name is “River.”

Article Title: Will Angel Reese attend FIFA World Cup game? Atlanta Dream star drops latest update
Article Text:
Angel Reese. Image via: Michael Reaves/ Getty Images

Will Angel Reese attend the FIFA World Cup game?



Angel Reese. Image via: Todd Kirkland/ Getty Images

Angel Reese appears in a stunning outfit before the Atlanta Dream game



Angel Reese. Image via: wnba/ Instagram

Angel Reese's performance this season so far



Will Angel Reese attend FIFA World Cup game? The Atlanta Dream star says she plans to be part of the tournament atmosphere in Atlanta after missing an opportunity to attend a match earlier this week, adding another chapter to a summer that has already featured major milestones on and off the court.Speaking on SportsCenter on Monday, Reese confirmed she intends to attend one of the World Cup matches at Mercedes-Benz Stadium. The update comes as the WNBA standout continues a strong first season with the Atlanta Dream, who entered Monday night's game against the Toronto Tempo riding a back-to-back winning streak.Angel Reese revealed that some of her Atlanta teammates were able to attend Sunday's World Cup match in the city, but her schedule prevented her from joining them."My teammates were able to go (Sunday). I didn't make it (Sunday), but I will plan to make one of the games," Reese said on SportsCenter.Her teammates watched Spain cruise to a 4-0 victory over Saudi Arabia at Mercedes-Benz Stadium. While Reese hopes to attend a future match, she specifically mentioned her desire to support the United States men's national team if the opportunity arises."If the U.S. comes here, I definitely want to see them play and go out there and support," she said."But it's really cool to see a different environment, different people coming here just to enjoy sports. It's because I really love sports."Although the current tournament bracket means the USMNT is not scheduled to play in Atlanta, Reese's comments highlighted the growing crossover between major international soccer events and American professional athletes. Atlanta has become one of the busiest host cities during the tournament, drawing large crowds and global attention.The 24-year-old also discussed a recent milestone that further strengthened her case as one of the league's premier rebounders. Reese became the fastest player in WNBA history to reach 1,000 career rebounds, accomplishing the feat in just 79 games."I think people don't realize, rebounding is harder than you think. Defensive rebounds (are) a little bit more easier, but going in and crashing every single time to get second-chance opportunities on the offensive end," Reese said."You can look statistically, but not just from my shots but from my teammates, and it gives us more points. It gives us more opportunities. Just being able to come out and do what I do every single night just shows my consistency."Before Monday's matchup against the Toronto Tempo, Reese once again drew attention with her pregame fashion choice.The two-time WNBA All-Star arrived at State Farm Arena wearing a floor-length bronze kaftan-style gown featuring a plunging V-neckline and textured pleated design. She paired the look with a black choker necklace, metallic strappy heels and cornrow braids.Reese's tunnel appearances have become a regular talking point throughout the season, reflecting her growing influence beyond basketball as one of the league's most recognizable personalities.While Reese continues to make headlines away from the court, her production remains the biggest reason Atlanta sits atop the Eastern Conference standings.The Dream forward is averaging a career-high 15.3 points, 11.9 rebounds, 2.7 assists and 1.3 steals per game. Her impact on both ends of the floor has helped Atlanta compile an 11-4 record and emerge as one of the WNBA's early championship contenders.
Article Summary: Angel Reese says she plans to attend one of the World Cup matches in Atlanta. Reese missed an opportunity to attend a match earlier this week. The 24-year-old is averaging a career-high 15.3 points, 11.9 rebounds and 2.7 assists.

Article Title: Knicks champion spotted making it rain at strip club after eight-day drinking pledge
Article Text:
Jose Alvarado. Image via: Gregory Shamus/ Getty Images

NBA title winner Jose Alvarado spotted partying at a strip club as celebrations continue



Jose Alvarado at at night club. Image via: Starlets NY/ Instagram

What is Jose Alvarado's future with the Knicks?



Knicks champion Jose Alvarado has become one of the faces of New York's NBA title celebrations after footage emerged of the guard throwing stacks of cash at a Queens strip club, extending the festivities tied to the franchise's first championship in more than five decades.The late-night appearance came less than two weeks after the New York Knicks secured the 2026 NBA Finals title. Alvarado, a midseason addition who quickly earned a key role under head coach Mike Brown, has embraced the spotlight during the city's championship celebrations while also facing an important contract decision that could shape his future with the organization.Jose Alvarado's championship tour took another turn when he was filmed at Starlets, a gentleman's club in Queens, tossing dollar bills into the air as fans gathered around the stage. Videos circulating online showed the Knicks guard wearing a heavy chain and taking part in a celebration that reflected the mood surrounding New York's long-awaited title victory.The outing followed comments Alvarado made during a podcast before the playoffs reached their conclusion."If we win, I'm going to be drunk for eight days," Alvarado said. "I'm having a party in like every state."Since the Knicks lifted the Larry O'Brien Trophy, Alvarado has seemingly remained committed to that promise.He has appeared at multiple parties and public celebrations across New York, becoming one of the most visible players during the city's championship festivities.Hours before the nightclub appearance, Alvarado posted a photo of himself asleep face-down on a folding table during his travels. The image carried the caption "Day 7," prompting many fans to assume the marathon celebration was winding down.Instead, the veteran guard found enough energy for another headline-grabbing stop.The Knicks' championship parade through Manhattan earlier in the week drew massive crowds as players, celebrities, team owner James Dolan and New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani celebrated the franchise's first title in 53 years. The parade highlighted how deeply the championship resonated across the city after decades of waiting.While the celebrations continue, business is already underway for the reigning champions.The Knicks hold the No. 24 and No. 31 picks in the 2026 NBA Draft and are actively exploring roster and salary-cap options. Alvarado's contract situation is one of several issues the front office must address before free agency begins.After arriving in a trade from the New Orleans Pelicans, Alvarado averaged 7.4 points, 3.4 assists and 2.5 rebounds while providing the defensive intensity and energy that helped strengthen New York's rotation during its championship run.The 27-year-old holds a $4.5 million player option for the 2026-27 season. Rather than making an immediate decision, Alvarado and the Knicks agreed to move the deadline from June 22 to June 26."While the reigning champion New York Knicks assess their trade options for picks No. 24 and 31 in this week's NBA Draft, sources say reserve guard Jose Alvarado has agreed to move the decision date on his $4.5 million player option for 2026-27 from tomorrow, June 22, back to June 26," NBA insider Jake Fischer reported in a post on X.The extra time gives both sides flexibility ahead of draft night, while leaving open the question of whether one of New York's most beloved championship contributors will return for another title defense.
Article Summary: Knicks guard Jose Alvarado spotted partying at a strip club as celebrations continue. The late-night appearance came less than two weeks after the New York Knicks secured the 2026 NBA Finals title. The 27-year-old guard holds a $4.5 million player option for the 20 26-27 season.
